channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse Daily — The Assurance Gap
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: A board-level CyberPulse Emerging Risks brief on assurance as a live operating question across collaboration archives, industrial exposure, developer automation, ransomware tradecraft, identity governance, and AI agents.
